note: Balanced 5-name US cross-sector (the SKILL.md usage example): tech/financials/healthcare/energy, max 25%. Expect no/minor concentration flag, a clean Macro Snapshot + Market Regime, factor-tilt table. Baseline brief-shape + word-limit case.

Tech-concentrated 4-name US (top-1=45%, top-3=90%): expect Concentration + likely Redundancy alerts, a momentum/growth factor tilt, and Action Items that name the concentration. Stresses action_items_grounded + factor_tilt_interpretation_consistent.
